title: Majhaul Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Majhaul with a Z-Score of +3.97. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Majhaul is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 12.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 75%, and wind speed is moderate at 15.7 km/h. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no relief in sight, as indicated by the 0.0 GG Heating Degree Day (HDD) value.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
